cit.basis: Flat 30% business income tax on bodies (corporations) under the Federal Income Tax Proclamation No. 979/2016.
cit.note: Administered by the Ministry of Revenues (MoR). Unincorporated businesses are taxed on progressive individual schedules instead.

vat.note: Standard VAT rate of 15% under VAT Proclamation No. 1341/2024, which modernised the 2002 VAT regime (registration thresholds, digital services, exemptions).

turnover_tax.note: Turnover Tax (TOT) of 2% on goods and 10% on services applies to businesses below the VAT registration threshold, in lieu of VAT. Out of scope for this profit-based estimator.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; the Ethiopian fiscal year (8 July - 7 July) and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Mining/petroleum-specific rates, TOT, WHT, relief, filing, and incentive regimes may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
